---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like to see?

Describe the feature. Be specific about what it does and who it is for.

## Which part of the system does this touch?

- [ ] Investigation Engine (Scout / Oracle / Mirror)
- [ ] The Lens (Gadfly / Players / Context)
- [ ] The Campaign (Lever / media specs / talking points)
- [ ] The Forum (threads / posts / peer review)
- [ ] Credentials
- [ ] Moderation
- [ ] Federation (ActivityPub)
- [ ] A jurisdiction module (specify which)
- [ ] Auth
- [ ] Other

## The Illich Test

Ivan Illich argued that tools should make people more capable without the tool. Before proposing a feature, apply this test:

**Does this make the citizen more capable WITHOUT The Republic?**

If a citizen uses this feature and leaves having learned nothing, having developed no skill, having built no understanding they can apply elsewhere — the feature may create dependency rather than capacity.

How does your proposed feature pass this test? (Be honest. If it doesn't, that's worth discussing.)

## Alternatives you considered

What else could solve this problem? Why is this approach better?

## Additional context

Anything else relevant. If there is prior art (another civic tech tool, a government service, an academic framework), link to it.
